practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the binary-search moves
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it says what to do when the middle is equal, too small, or too large.
hints: Too small means the target must be farther right.
Too large means the target must be farther left.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the three main binary-search moves.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck what each middle comparison tells you about the target.

blanks.label: What to do when the middle matches
What to do when the middle is too small
What to do when the middle is too large
